system.description:
When you enter danger aboard a vehicle, you gain +1 impact for vehicle speed and maneuverability and you don’t suffer a worse position when moving around on the outside of a high-speed vehicle. Your vehicles gain armor.
This means that all sorts of vehicle maneuvers which might ordinarily be desperate—jumping from one rover to another, crawling along the outside of a dropjet, etc.—are more likely to be risky. Any vehicles which already have armor gain an additional armor box.
